forbidden_shortcuts: assemble a post-hoc action from desired outputs
blockers.recommended_next_action: Localize the common measure, orientation, edge, and variation data first.
blockers.title: Unified boundary/action principle
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive the complete boundary/collar action and all sector reductions from one variational principle.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The repository contains compatible boundary and collar terms, but no unique complete action generating every sector rule.

forbidden_shortcuts: declare ontology support to be complete-action proof
blockers.recommended_next_action: Use the completed collar/action domain to derive response coordinates and inequalities.
blockers.title: Sector projectors and admissible domains
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive projector ranges and admissible cone constraints from the complete action and boundary conditions.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: Projectors and the neutral cone are explicit but not all uniquely generated by the complete action.

blockers.recommended_next_action: Derive the charged stiffness from the shared boundary measure and action Hessian.
blockers.title: Charged hierarchy and stiffness normalization
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive the charged Hessian/stiffness operator and normalization before comparison.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The action does not uniquely select the charged q/j stiffness ratio or physical normalization.

forbidden_shortcuts: use mixed-scale masses as precision truth
blockers.recommended_next_action: Keep scheme-aware comparison separate until a vetted precision runtime is available.
blockers.title: Quark hierarchy and running/scheme policy
blockers.what_would_close_it: Provide validated scheme-consistent external running inputs and uncertainty propagation as comparison data only.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: Common-scale comparison remains approximate and cannot promote frozen ratios to precision QCD matches.

forbidden_shortcuts: use separate electron and muon factors
blockers.recommended_next_action: Trace eta_l through the normalized boundary measure and stochastic generator.
blockers.title: Charged-lepton closure and eta_l origin
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive stochastic normalization, active-channel rule, and mode norm from the boundary action without a lepton fit.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The alpha/pi stochastic strength and channel fraction are partial/conditional rather than complete action consequences.

forbidden_shortcuts: select an exponent by V_cb residual
blockers.recommended_next_action: Search the finite channel algebra and weak projection for an exponent theorem.
blockers.title: CKM mixing law and 1/16 exponent
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive the CKM suppression exponent from a pre-comparison boundary channel operator.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The mixing exponent remains a candidate channel-dilution rule rather than an action-derived result.

forbidden_shortcuts: treat a dimensionless response as eV/GeV
blockers.recommended_next_action: Complete shared action/measure normalization before revisiting physical mass.
blockers.title: PMNS structure and physical neutrino mass gate
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive numeric sqrt(A_nu/Z_nu), physical K_neutral,eff, and the cone from the complete action.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The spectral theorem is conditional and lacks numeric stiffness length, physical curvature, and a complete-action cone.

blockers.title: CP/Z6 holonomy and domain status
blockers.what_would_close_it: No core closure needed; preserve provenance and the retired-target boundary.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The core holonomy constraint is closed, while a standalone production vertex is correctly retired.

forbidden_shortcuts: fit gauge normalization to observed couplings
blockers.recommended_next_action: Complete the boundary trace and measure normalization entering the gauge action.
blockers.title: Gauge-sector couplings and normalization
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive gauge kinetic normalization from the unified action and separate loop matching from theorem inputs.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: Gauge screens are reproducible, but full normalized action and loop/RG matching remain conditional.

forbidden_shortcuts: claim scaffold status as a solved scalar action
blockers.recommended_next_action: Resolve the shared collar measure and profile/embedding dependencies.
blockers.title: Higgs/scalar/topographic coupling
blockers.what_would_close_it: Solve or bound the scalar profile and derive its boundary/collar action and physical normalization.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The scalar profile, threshold, embedding, and complete collar action are not jointly derived.

forbidden_shortcuts: set the measure by particle masses
treat identity transport as cross-scale running
blockers.recommended_next_action: Close the derived shape and identity subblocks and expose the physical normalization remainder.
blockers.title: Boundary measure, collar, and transport normalization
blockers.what_would_close_it: Separate and prove the geometric shape/identity pieces, then derive physical normalization and cross-scale transport from the action.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: The geometric Jacobian shape and identity transport exist, but physical measure units and nontrivial transport remain unresolved.

forbidden_shortcuts: use threshold clipping as a positivity proof
blockers.recommended_next_action: Use the completed measure, edge, and variation domain to derive the cone.
blockers.title: Complete action-to-response cone derivation
blockers.what_would_close_it: Derive the response coordinates and nonnegative inequalities from the complete normalized neutral action.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: Copositivity is exact on the stated cone, but the complete action does not yet uniquely generate that cone.

blockers.recommended_next_action: Run the frozen-integrity audit on every closure branch.
blockers.title: Frozen prediction integrity and no-retuning
blockers.what_would_close_it: Keep exact hashes and candidate/official branches separated.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: This does not block current completion; it is a permanent integrity gate.

blockers.recommended_next_action: Defer until the eligible interaction set and external runtimes are available.
blockers.title: External HEP runtime export and integration
blockers.what_would_close_it: Provision licensed runtimes, export a theorem-eligible model, and pass load/smoke checks.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: Wolfram/FeynRules, UFO export, and MadGraph smoke validation have not run successfully.

blockers.title: Public claims and forbidden-claims safety
blockers.what_would_close_it: Keep claim tests synchronized with every new artifact and CLI surface.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: This is an active safety gate rather than an unresolved scientific blocker.

blockers.recommended_next_action: Maintain the offline reviewer path and machine-readable ledger.
blockers.title: Reproducibility and reviewer handoff
blockers.what_would_close_it: Preserve deterministic artifacts, CLI reports, tests, and environment-independent claim boundaries.
blockers.why_it_blocks_full_completion: Offline review is reproducible; external runtime replication remains represented separately by FC-14.
